prompt: Incident from last night: one subscriber endpoint was down, and the fanout report claimed ALL of them failed — every entry carrying the dead endpoint's ECONNREFUSED message — yet two subscribers demonstrably received the payload (I have their receipts). Weirder still, the report object we snapshot to the audit log had more deliveries in it when it got logged again a second later. `node --test test_fanout.ts` reproduces the whole mess. Fix fanout.ts; don't modify the tests.
